title: Take a Leap to Speak — Conversational Arabic
about: A practical, conversation-based Arabic course designed especially for women, focused on helping you actually speak Arabic in your everyday life — from Lesson 1. Facilitated by Shaykhah Rukayya Samsodien. Muhadathah Workbook included in course fee.
subjects: Name fruits, groceries, describe your home
Real conversations from the very first session
